zh.lifeSummary: 當John Giffard於1232年1月19日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德時，他的父親Elias Giffard53歲，母親Alice de Maltravers27歲。他和Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1299年5月29日在英國維爾爾波頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾馬爾斯波利馬爾斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John Giffard was born on 19 January 1232, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Elias Giffard, was 53 and his mother, Alice de Maltravers, was 27. He had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury. He died on 29 May 1299, in Boyton, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Giffard est né le 19 janvier 1232, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Elias Giffard, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Alice de Maltravers, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1299, à Boyton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire,: Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Giffard am 19. Januar 1232 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Elias Giffard 53 und seine Mutter Alice de Maltravers 27. Er hatte mit Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1299 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Boyton, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Giffard è nato il il 19 gennaio 1232 nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Elias Giffard, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Maltravers, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury. Morì il 29 maggio 1299, nel Boyton, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Giffardが1232年1月19日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドで生まれた時，父Elias Giffardは53歳，母Alice de Maltraversは27歳であった。彼はMaud Clifford Countess of Salisburyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1299年5月29日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアボイトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルメスブリーマルメスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire,: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 맬메스버이 맬메스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: John Giffard(이)가 1232년 1월 19일 영국 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elias Giffard(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Maltravers(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 5월 29일 영국 윌츠히르 보이턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 맬메스버이 맬메스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire,: Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Giffard nasceu em 19 de janeiro de 1232, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Elias Giffard, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Maltravers, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1299, em Boyton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Malmesbury Abbey, Malmesbury, Wiltshire,: малмесбури эбби, малмесбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Giffard родился 19 января 1232 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Elias Giffard было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Maltravers, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury. Он умер 29 мая 1299 г. в местности боитон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности малмесбури эбби, малмесбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury.
